---
title: "Media"
---

## Media Coverage

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.info-card}
### Study aims to use sunlight to reduce myopia in children, help seniors age better

*The Straits Times — 9 November 2023*

[Read article](https://www.straitstimes.com/singapore/study-to-use-sunlight-to-reduce-myopia-in-children-help-seniors-age-better)
:::

::: {.info-card}
### How much sunlight do you need to reduce risks of myopia? A new sensor will tell you

*Channel News Asia — 10 November 2023*

[Read article](https://www.channelnewsasia.com/singapore/nus-medicine-tumcreate-sunlight-myopia-seniors-light-sensor-3912016)
:::

::: {.info-card}
### Study aims to nudge parents into bringing their children outdoors more to prevent myopia

*YouTube — 10 November 2023*

[Watch video](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FoyVbsdSESA)
:::

::: {.info-card}
### 本地研发新应用“点亮” 促家长让孩子多晒太阳防近视

*联合早报 (Zaobao) — 9 November 2023*

[Read article](https://www.zaobao.com.sg/news/singapore/story20231109-1449051)
:::

:::

---

## Institutional & Partnership Announcements

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.info-card}
### Reducing Childhood Myopia, Boosting Resilient Ageing Through Novel Light Exposure App

*TUMCREATE — 9 November 2023*

[Read announcement](https://www.tum-create.edu.sg/news/reducing-childhood-myopia-boosting-resilient-ageing-through-novel-light-exposure-app)
:::

::: {.info-card}
### Lions Befrienders and TUMCREATE Sign MoU to Study Optimal Light Exposure in Seniors

*TUMCREATE — 19 November 2024*

[Read announcement](https://www.tum-create.edu.sg/news/lions-befrienders-and-tumcreate-sign-mou-to-study-optimal-light-exposure-in-seniors)
:::

:::
